name: ethantiv-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Mirosław Zaniewicz.

plugins.name: babysit-pr
plugins.description: Local equivalent of autofix-pr: monitor and fix the current PR (CI failures, review comments, merge conflicts) in the local Claude Code session instead of a remote cloud session

plugins.name: book-forge
plugins.description: Kompletny pipeline do tworzenia powieści rojem agentów (Workflow), 12 etapów: od luki rynkowej i pomysłu, przez konspekt, biblię książki, pisanie i redakcję scen ze spójnością opartą na biblii, po złożony maszynopis i pakiet wydawniczy. Każdy etap z obowiązkową redakcją na poprawną, naturalną polszczyznę (unslop, anty-AI-slop); research przez agent-browser w etapach analitycznych i world-research.

plugins.name: dependency-update
plugins.description: Scan project dependencies across all ecosystems and update them safely — minor/patch in a sweep, major bumps researched one at a time

plugins.name: eli
plugins.description: Explain like I'm an intern: explain any concept, term, or piece of code to a smart adult who simply lacks domain knowledge — short, vivid, example-driven, no fluff.

plugins.name: read-arxiv-paper
plugins.description: Download arXiv paper LaTeX source, analyze it, and produce a project-contextualized summary

plugins.name: roadmap
plugins.description: Generate docs/ROADMAP.md via an agent swarm: many perspectives propose features, a product-manager panel scores them for usefulness, sellability and wow-factor

plugins.name: unslop
plugins.description: Edit LLM-generated documents to remove telltale signs of AI writing (per Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing"): AI vocabulary, negative parallelisms, rule of three, promotional tone, vague attributions, throat-clearing, fake-profound kickers, formatting slop. Polish and English. Ships a SessionStart hook that applies the style to all agent prose (disable by creating .claude/unslop-off).

plugins.name: teach-me
plugins.description: Interactive tutor that guides you to a deep understanding of a subject (a code change, PR, file, or abstract topic) incrementally — running checklist, drilling into the "why", and quizzes; doesn't finish until full understanding is verified.

plugins.name: visual-prompt
plugins.description: Generate three .txt files with artistic text-to-image prompts in three contrasting visual directions, written by separate subagents in parallel. Two profiles: art (artwork, posters, photography) and ui (artistic interface mockups). Slash-invocable skills: /visual-prompt-art, /visual-prompt-ui.
